transcript.clean_text: it wasn't easy for the sprinters on the first week of the Vuelta 2017 only last Tuesday was one of them able to take a stage today the stage will be complicated again for difficulties are on the menu before the final is sent to Alva Sabra three point four kilometers with an average slope of 10% an ideal track for escape specialists the German John degan cope is not at the start he had to abandon due to sickness 16 men immediately leave the pack behind amongst him the leader of the mountain classification Davi Davi laya the frenchman juliana philippe anorexia Java and the Spaniards Ruben Fernandez and Mark Soler the escapees are pushed by tailwind and managed to keep a lead of 4 to 5 minutes to the peloton led by Christopher froome's Team Sky Davi Davi Leia from Cannondale passes to four summits in the lead and the Italian takes all the points for the mountain classification the peloton knows that the escapees won't be taken let's them right to victory 30 kilometers before arrival the escape tube falls apart and the Kazakh Alex Aidid Senkaku strongest on the final 20% descent he leaves his fellow escapees behind that takes the stage solo a Talco Sabra behind him the favorites past the line led by a reborn Alberto Contador followed by Chris Froome and Esteban Chavez through moulds onto the red jersey and even takes some time of his rivals today it's the first stage win on a major race for Alexei luchenko the 24 year old Kazakh u23 road waste world champion in 2012 confirms his progression after taking stages on the tour of Switzerland and very nice it's the greatest career success for the young Mountain specialists Selita welted order for this climb was really very difficult because I started attacking before the ascent I was alone at first and then a teammate from Katyusha helped me we had tailwind I'm happy I took a very nice stage it's a great tour a great welter I'm happy I want to thank everyone the team the riders al excited cinco takes a stage 42 seconds ahead of the eritrean mare how we kudos the Spaniard marks earlier finish a third today the favorites past the finish line over four and a half minutes after the stage winner in the overall ranking Chris Froome stays in the lead and even takes 8 seconds of the American vangarderen Esteban Chavez climbs from rank 6 to rank 3 today while the twin brothers adam in simon yates lie on the ranks 8 and 9 stage 6 on thursday will lead along the mediterranean sea shore again the pet will go from Villarreal to Segundo and five difficulties will be on the menu of this 204 kilometer long stage amongst them the puerta del Garbi 36 kilometers from arrival in the outskirt of valencia a second category is sent it should be another rough day for the sprinters who are unlikely to fight for victory in the city of Segundo you
